features.featureTitle: Audit `frontend/src/App.tsx` — specifically the `AuthGuard` component — and ensure it does not make any routing decision (redirect to `/login` or render protected content) while `isInitializing` is `true`. While `isInitializing` is `true`, render only the full-page military-themed loading spinner. Only after `isInitializing` has definitively settled to `false` may the guard redirect unauthenticated users to `/login` or render protected routes.

Audit `frontend/src/hooks/useActorReady.ts` and enforce that `isActorReady` is `true` only when all three conditions are met in order: (a) `isInitializing` from `useInternetIdentity` is `false`, (b) the principal is non-anonymous (not equal to `Principal.anonymous()`), and (c) the actor instance returned by `useActor` is non-null. If the hook currently sets `isActorReady` to `true` before `isInitializing` has settled, or before the principal is confirmed non-anonymous, or before the actor is non-null, rewrite it to enforce all three conditions strictly.
